name: Control+Tail Score-First TTT on the Accepted SP8192 Top-1 Stack
author: zhenyi-ji
architecture: Accepted SP8192 11L/512d/8H/4KV stack with 3-layer recurrence, parallel residuals, QK gain 5.25, GPTQ int6 matrices, int8 embeddings, Brotli compression, and legal score-first TTT.
our_contribution: During score-first TTT, freeze the full model except existing control/gating parameters everywhere plus all parameters in the last 3 transformer blocks. This control_tail_all subset adapts 8,681,560 parameters instead of the accepted all-parameter TTT path, while preserving score-before-update ordering and avoiding new adapter modules.
novelty: A targeted implicit-adapter TTT subspace built entirely from existing model weights: global scalar/gating controls plus terminal transformer blocks. This sits between control-only TTT, which was too weak, and all-parameter TTT, which is less selective.

attribution.legal_ttt_framework: Accepted score-first TTT precedent from the base submission
attribution.adapter_ttt_principle: PR #1767 used only as mechanism inspiration; no code copied
attribution.warmdown_floor_principle: PR #1874 MIN_LR signal used as hyperparameter inspiration; no code copied

notes: This is intentionally submitted as a non-record contribution. It is one validated seed, does not beat the current official SOTA shown in the README on 2026-04-30, and its TTT eval time (776.046s) is above the 10-minute eval cutoff. The artifact remains under 16MB and the score-first TTT order is legal.
